mapper.select:
SELECT r.id AS request_id, r.user_id AS user_id, u.student_id AS student_id, u.name AS name,
u.phone AS current_phone, u.major AS current_major, u.grade AS current_grade,
r.phone AS new_phone, r.major AS new_major, r.grade AS new_grade,
CASE WHEN r.password IS NULL OR r.password = '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS password_changed,
r.status AS status, r.rejection_reason AS rejection_reason, r.created_at AS created_at, r.updated_at AS updated_at FROM user_change_requests r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.status = 'pending' ORDER BY r.created_at ASC
